item.title: Get to Know a College Basketball Mid-Major: Big South
item.description: A look at who's who and what they are playing for in the men's and women's college basketball mid-major Big South.

item.title: USA Midfielder Weston McKennie Reportedly Wants Salary Doubled To Stay At Juventus
item.description: Though Weston Mckinnie, a catalyst of the Juventus midfield, transformed his season, his future hangs by a thread.

item.title: Raphinha Set For Barcelona Return As Rashford Remains Out With Knee Injury
item.description: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick gets a large boost for Monday evening's La Liga clash against Girona at Montilivi.

item.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Angels' Mike Trout Wants To Return to Center Field
item.description: It's time to dust off those ball bags â MLB spring training has commenced!

item.title: College Football Stock Watch: Why USC is Heading in Right Direction, and Alabama Isn't
item.description: FOX Sports' Joel Klatt explains which teams are trending up and which are trending down as we enter the offseason.
